name: cortex
description: Always-on learning system that makes Claude smarter about you with every conversation. Bidirectional: learns (mining + decay) and forgets gracefully. v4.5 adds memory legibility — an auto-maintained `memory/index.md` catalog, `/research-gaps` for autonomous gap-filling research, and `/setup-obsidian` so the second brain becomes a graph-viewable, mobile-readable Obsidian vault. Works on both Cowork (Claude Desktop) and Claude Code. The more you use it, the better Claude gets.
